notes: Public list prices, per million tokens (mtok), as of as_of_date.
Used ONLY to compute a uniform USD figure from raw token counts when a
tool reports tokens but no native cost_usd. We NEVER blend across pricing
models in a single headline number (see methodology cost caveats).
cache_read_per_mtok is the discounted rate for prompt-cache reads.
Verify each rate against the linked source before publishing any cost
figure; rates change. If a model is absent, cost is reported as null
Subscription-priced tools (e.g. fixed monthly seats) are NOT priced here;
they belong in a separate subscription column per the methodology.
